description: Initial openclaw-langgraph-bridge package: createOpenClawNode, OpenClawClient, sequentialRouter, conditionalRouter
Add retry with exponential backoff to createOpenClawNode
conditionalRouter unit tests + LangGraph conditional branching integration test
mergeResults utility + parallel fan-out integration test
validateState + withValidation: field/type/custom validation + node wrapper guard
withFallback + mapState: error recovery wrapper + state field mapping utility
withTimeout: node timeout guard with fallback state
withRetry: node retry wrapper with exponential backoff + onRetry callback
pipeline: sequential node composition + continueOnError + completedSteps accumulation
batch(): parallel node execution with concurrency limit
switchRoute(): multi-branch conditional routing with predicates
withRateLimit(): sliding window rate limiting wrapper
withCache (memoization + TTL + maxSize eviction + custom keyFn + stats) + aggregate/mergeAll/collectAll (reduce partial states). +16 tests (78→94).
withMiddleware: composable middleware chain for node wrappers (left-to-right, short-circuit, retry pattern). 8 tests (94→102).
loop(): conditional loop node with until predicate + maxIterations guard. 6 tests (102→108).
subgraph(): composable sub-graph with input/output state mapping + error isolation
